_comment: GitHub Webhook Payload Example - Sample webhook event for issues.opened
_description: This is the raw payload sent by GitHub when an Issue is created. The webhook handler validates and parses this to trigger task execution.

_webhook_headers._comment: HTTP headers sent with webhook POST request

issue.title: Design and implement payment gateway integration
issue.body:
## Context

This task is part of the e-commerce milestone (M001). We need to integrate a payment gateway to process customer transactions securely.

## Goal

Design and implement a secure payment gateway integration supporting Stripe and PayPal.

## Constraints

- Must comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements
- Maximum transaction timeout: 30 seconds

## Expected Outputs

- payment-service: implementation-summary

milestone.title: M001 - E-commerce Core Features
milestone.description: Core e-commerce functionality including payments, inventory, and checkout

_security_verification._comment: Webhook handler validates signature using HMAC-SHA256
verification_steps: 1. Extract signature from X-Hub-Signature-256 header (remove 'sha256=' prefix)
2. Compute HMAC-SHA256 of raw payload body using webhook secret
4. If valid, parse JSON and process event

_event_filtering._comment: Webhook handler filters events based on configuration

_dispatch_generation._comment: After validation, adapter generates Dispatch Payload

dispatch_payload.goal: Design and implement a secure payment gateway integration supporting Stripe and PayPal.
